steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Both terms have the same variable part, $x^4$, so subtract only the coefficients. The exponent stays $4$ because the powers are not being multiplied.
$$
13x^4-7x^4=(13-7)x^4=6x^4
$$

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The equivalent expression is $6x^4$. The answer is B.
